requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and LIBNOR Conformity Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及LIBNOR合格评定审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及LIBNOR合格評定審查

summary.en: LIBNOR is Lebanon's standards body and may adopt IEC-based Lebanese standards (NL) or apply conformity expectations for regulated electrical products. For EV charging equipment, the practical safety evidence baseline should be IEC 61851-1 for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment. Documentation should cover protective earthing, control-pilot behaviour, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, enclosure ingress protection, installation instructions, labels, and model-specific test reports. The applicable LIBNOR route must be confirmed for the exact product, HS code, importer, and project.
summary.zh: LIBNOR是黎巴嫩标准机构，可能采纳基于IEC的黎巴嫩标准（NL）或对受监管电气产品适用合格评定要求。对于电动汽车充电设备，实际安全证据基线应为IEC 61851-1传导式电动汽车供电设备通用要求，以及IEC 61851-23直流电动汽车供电设备要求。文件应覆盖保护接地、控制导引行为、绝缘监测、互锁、过流和过温保护、适用时的急停、外壳防护、安装说明、标签及型号特定测试报告。具体LIBNOR路径必须按产品、HS编码、进口商和项目确认。
summary.zht: LIBNOR是黎巴嫩標準機構，可能採納基於IEC的黎巴嫩標準（NL）或對受監管電氣產品適用合格評定要求。對於電動汽車充電設備，實際安全證據基線應為IEC 61851-1傳導式電動汽車供電設備通用要求，以及IEC 61851-23直流電動汽車供電設備要求。文件應覆蓋保護接地、控制導引行為、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流和過溫保護、適用時的急停、外殼防護、安裝說明、標籤及型號特定測試報告。具體LIBNOR路徑必須按產品、HS編碼、進口商和項目確認。

standards_or_laws: LIBNOR Lebanese standards and conformity expectations for regulated products where applicable
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 62196 connector safety evidence where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for electric vehicle conductive charging system general requirements, together with GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 DC charging communication. GB/T 18487.1 evidence can be useful for engineering review, but it is not a direct substitute for IEC 61851 evidence or a LIBNOR conformity determination because connector, signaling, communication, labeling, and market-access assumptions differ.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023电动汽车传导充电系统通用要求，并结合GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930直流充电通信。GB/T 18487.1证据可作为工程审查参考，但不能直接替代IEC 61851证据或LIBNOR合格评定结论，因为接口、信号、通信、标签和市场准入假设均不同。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023電動汽車傳導充電系統通用要求，並結合GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930直流充電通訊。GB/T 18487.1證據可作為工程審查參考，但不能直接替代IEC 61851證據或LIBNOR合格評定結論，因為接口、信號、通訊、標籤和市場准入假設均不同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, enclosure IP evidence, protective-device ratings, installation instructions for Lebanon's 220/380 V 50 Hz environment, and an importer-facing LIBNOR scope memo. If the charger is supplied for solar-plus-battery or generator-backed sites, document transfer switching, earthing, backup-power compatibility, and commissioning controls. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not enough without a clause-level IEC and Lebanon market-access gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、外壳IP证据、保护器件额定值、适用于黎巴嫩220/380 V 50 Hz环境的安装说明，以及面向进口商的LIBNOR适用范围备忘录。若充电桩用于太阳能加电池或发电机备用场站，应记录转换开关、接地、备用电源兼容性和调试控制。单独的GB/T 18487报告在未完成逐条IEC及黎巴嫩市场准入差距评估的情况下并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、外殼IP證據、保護器件額定值、適用於黎巴嫩220/380 V 50 Hz環境的安裝說明，以及面向進口商的LIBNOR適用範圍備忘錄。若充電樁用於太陽能加電池或發電機備用場站，應記錄轉換開關、接地、備用電源相容性和調試控制。單獨的GB/T 18487報告在未完成逐條IEC及黎巴嫩市場准入差距評估的情況下並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — LIBNOR conformity and regulated-product treatment must be confirmed for the exact charger, HS code, importer, and project; IEC 61851 safety evidence is the practical baseline for IEC-aligned tenders and professional due diligence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 or LIBNOR evidence without additional assessment

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Lebanon-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851-1 evidence, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, enclosure and protection documentation, and a product-specific LIBNOR conformity check before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向黎巴嫩的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851-1证据、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、外壳及保护文件，并在出货前完成产品特定LIBNOR合格评定核查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向黎巴嫩的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851-1證據、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、外殼及保護文件，並在出貨前完成產品特定LIBNOR合格評定核查。
